title: Classic British Apple Pie
description: A traditional British-style apple pie with a buttery crust and tender apples. Perfect for a cozy evening with family and friends.
instructions: Roll out the shortcrust pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Transfer the pastry to a 9-inch (23 cm) pie dish.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, granulated sugar, all-purpose flour, and cinnamon.
Pour the apple mixture into the pie crust.
Roll out the remaining pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Use this pastry to cover the pie and crimp the edges to seal.
Cut a few slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
Bake the pie for 40-50 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Let the pie cool for at least 30 minutes before serving.
